c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Split the integral based on the sign of sin 2x

sin 2x ≥ 0 on [0, π/2] and sin 2x ≤ 0 on [π/2, π]

∫₀^π |sin 2x| dx = ∫₀^(π/2) sin 2x dx - ∫_(π/2)^π sin 2x dx

Step 2: Evaluate each integral

= [-½ cos 2x]₀^(π/2) - [-½ cos 2x]_(π/2)^π

= (-½(-1) - (-½(1))) - (-½(1) - (-½(-1)))

= (½ + ½) - (-½ - ½) = 1 - (-1) = 2

အဖြေ: 2

q: Find the volume of the solid generated by revolving the shaded region about the x-axis. (y + 5x = 10, from x = 0 to x = 2)
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Express y in terms of x

y = 10 - 5x

Step 2: Set up the volume integral using the disc method

V = π ∫₀² y² dx = π ∫₀² (10 - 5x)² dx

Step 3: Evaluate the integral

Let u = 10 - 5x, then du = -5 dx

When x = 0, u = 10. When x = 2, u = 0

V = π ∫₁₀⁰ u² (-1/5) du = (π/5) ∫₀¹⁰ u² du

V = (π/5)[u³/3]₀¹⁰ = (π/5)(1000/3) = 200π/3

အဖြေ: 200π/3

q: Find the shaded area. (y = 5 and y = (x - 1)² + 1)
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Find the intersection points

(x - 1)² + 1 = 5
(x - 1)² = 4
x - 1 = ±2
x = -1, 3

Step 2: Set up the area integral

Area = ∫₋₁³ [5 - ((x - 1)² + 1)] dx
= ∫₋₁³ (4 - (x - 1)²) dx

Step 3: Evaluate the integral

Let u = x - 1, then du = dx
Limits: [-1, 3] → [-2, 2]

Area = ∫₋₂² (4 - u²) du = [4u - u³/3]₋₂²
= (8 - 8/3) - (-8 + 8/3) = 16 - 16/3 = 32/3

အဖြေ: 32/3

q: Find the shaded area. (y = x² - 2x - 3, from x = -1 to x = 3)
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: The curve is below x-axis between x = -1 and x = 3

Step 2: Set up the area integral

Area = ∫₋₁³ -(x² - 2x - 3) dx = ∫₋₁³ (-x² + 2x + 3) dx

Step 3: Evaluate the integral

= [-x³/3 + x² + 3x]₋₁³
= (-27/3 + 9 + 9) - (1/3 + 1 - 3)
= (-9 + 18) - (1/3 - 2) = 9 - (-5/3) = 9 + 5/3 = 32/3

အဖြေ: 32/3

q: Find the shaded area. (y = x² and y = 2x + 3)
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Find intersection points

x² = 2x + 3
x² - 2x - 3 = 0
(x - 3)(x + 1) = 0
x = -1, 3

Step 2: Set up the area integral

Area = ∫₋₁³ (2x + 3 - x²) dx

Step 3: Evaluate

= [x² + 3x - x³/3]₋₁³
= (9 + 9 - 9) - (1 - 3 + 1/3)
= 9 - (-5/3) = 9 + 5/3 = 32/3

အဖြေ: 32/3

q: Find the area of the shaded region. (y = x and y = x² + 1, from x = -1 to x = 2)
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Set up the area integral

Area = ₋₁² (x² + 1 - x) dx

Step 2: Evaluate the integral

= [x³/3 + x - x²/2]₁²
= (8/3 + 2 - 2) - (-1/3 - 1 - 1/2)
= 8/3 - (-11/6) = 16/6 + 11/6 = 27/6 = 9/2

အဖြေ: 9/2

q: Find the shaded area. (f(x) = -3x + 2, from x = 0 to x = 2/3)
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Set up the definite integral

Area = ₀^(2/3) (-3x + 2) dx

Step 2: Evaluate

= [-3x²/2 + 2x]₀^(2/3)
= (-3/2(4/9) + 2(2/3)) - 0
= -2/3 + 4/3 = 2/3

အဖြေ: 2/3

q: Find the area bounded by y = x³ - 4x² + 3x and the x-axis
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Find x-intercepts

x³ - 4x² + 3x = 0
x(x² - 4x + 3) = 0
x(x - 1)(x - 3) = 0
x = 0, 1, 3

Step 2: Set up area integral

Area = ∫₀¹ (x³ - 4x² + 3x) dx + ∫₁³ -(x³ - 4x² + 3x) dx

Step 3: Evaluate

(x³ - 4x² + 3x) dx = x⁴/4 - 4x³/3 + 3x²/2

For [0,1]: (1/4 - 4/3 + 3/2) = 5/12
For [1,3]: |(81/4 - 36 + 27/2) - 5/12| = 32/12

Total = 5/12 + 32/12 = 37/12

အဖြေ: 37/12

q: Find the area between y = 2x and y = x²
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Find intersection points

x² = 2x
x² - 2x = 0
x(x - 2) = 0
x = 0, 2

Step 2: Set up area integral

Area = ₀² (2x - x²) dx

Step 3: Evaluate

= [x² - x³/3]₀² = (4 - 8/3) - 0 = 4/3

အဖြေ: 4/3

q: Find the volume when f(x) = √(sin x) for 0 ≤ x ≤ π/2 is rotated about x-axis
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Set up volume integral (disc method)

V = π ∫₀^(π/2) [f(x)]² dx = π ∫₀^(π/2) (√(sin x))² dx

Step 2: Simplify and evaluate

V = π ∫₀^(π/2) sin x dx = π[-cos x]₀^(π/2)
= π(-cos(π/2) + cos 0) = π(0 + 1) = π

အဖြေ: π

q: Find the shaded area. (y = 9 - x², from x = -3 to x = 3)
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Set up the area integral

Area = ∫₋³ (9 - x²) dx

Step 2: Evaluate

= [9x - x³/3]₋₃³
= (27 - 9) - (-27 + 9)
= 18 - (-18) = 36

အဖြေ: 36

q: Find the area under y = sin(2x + π/3) from x = 0 to x = π/3
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Set up the integral

Area = ∫₀^(π/3) sin(2x + π/3) dx

Step 2: Evaluate

= [-½ cos(2x + π/3)]₀^(π/3)
= -½[cos(π) - cos(π/3)]
= -½[-1 - ½] = -½[-3/2] = 3/4

အဖြေ: 3/4

q: Find the shaded area. (y = x² and y = 2x - x²)
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Find intersection points

x² = 2x - x²
2x² - 2x = 0
2x(x - 1) = 0
x = 0, 1

Step 2: Set up area integral

Area = ∫₀¹ (2x - x² - x²) dx = ∫₀¹ (2x - 2x²) dx

Step 3: Evaluate

= [x² - 2x³/3]₀¹ = (1 - 2/3) - 0 = 1/3

အဖြေ: 1/3

q: The shaded area is 12a unit². Find a. (y = x² + 2, from x = -a to x = a)
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Set up the integral

Area = ∫₋ₐᵃ (x² + 2) dx = [x³/3 + 2x]₋ₐᵃ
= (a³/3 + 2a) - (-a³/3 - 2a) = 2a³/3 + 4a

Step 2: Equate to 12a

2a³/3 + 4a = 12a
2a³/3 = 8a
2a³ = 24a
a² = 12 (since a > 0)
a = √12 = 2√3

အဖြေ: 2√3

q: The shaded area is 6r unit². Find r. (y = x², from x = -r to x = r)
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Set up the integral

Area = ∫₋ᵣʳ x² dx = [x³/3]₋ᵣʳ = r³/3 - (-r³/3) = 2r³/3

Step 2: Equate to 6r

2r³/3 = 6r
2r³ = 18r
r² = 9 (since r > 0)
r = 3

အဖြေ: 3

အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Find antiderivative

∫(-3x + 2) dx = -3x²/2 + 2x

Step 2: Evaluate at limits

= [-3x²/2 + 2x]₀^(2/3)
= (-3/2(4/9) + 2(2/3)) - 0
= -2/3 + 4/3 = 2/3

အဖြေ: 2/3

q: Find the area between y = x and y = x²
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Find intersection points

x = x²
x² - x = 0
x(x - 1) = 0
x = 0, 1

Step 2: Set up area integral

Area = ∫₀¹ (x - x²) dx

Step 3: Evaluate

= [x²/2 - x³/3]₀¹ = (1/2 - 1/3) - 0 = 1/6

အဖြေ: 1/6

q: Find the shaded area. (y = x² and y = x + 6)
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Find intersection points

x² = x + 6
x² - x - 6 = 0
(x - 3)(x + 2) = 0
x = -2, 3

Step 2: Set up area integral

Area = ∫₋₂³ (x + 6 - x²) dx

Step 3: Evaluate

= [x²/2 + 6x - x³/3]₋₂³
= (9/2 + 18 - 9) - (2 - 12 + 8/3)
= 27/2 - (-22/3) = 81/6 + 44/6 = 125/6

အဖြေ: 125/6

q: Find the shaded area. (f(x) = √(2 - x), from x = 0 to x = 2)
c:
အဖြေရှင်းလင်းချက်:

Step 1: Set up the integral

Area = ∫₀² √(2 - x) dx

Step 2: Use substitution

Let u = 2 - x, then du = -dx
When x = 0, u = 2. When x = 2, u = 0

Area = ₂⁰ √u (-du) = ₀² u^(1/2) du

Step 3: Evaluate

= [2u^(3/2)/3]₀² = 2/3 (2)^(3/2) = 2/3 (2√2) = 4√2/3

အဖြေ: 4√2/3
